scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env up -d --build migrate api worker web
scripts.docker:up:app: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env up -d --build api worker web
scripts.docker:logs: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env logs -f --tail=100 api worker web
scripts.prod:up: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup up -d --build
scripts.prod:up:app: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup up -d --build --force-recreate web api worker
scripts.prod:restart: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup up -d api
scripts.prod:restart:web: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup up -d --build --force-recreate web
scripts.prod:down: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup down
scripts.prod:ps: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup ps
scripts.prod:logs: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel --profile backup logs -f --tail=100
scripts.prod:logs:tunnel: docker compose -f infra/compose/full.yml --env-file .env --profile tunnel logs -f --tail=100 cloudflared
